Senegal is the West African region and French colony that forms the western goal of the balloon voyage in [[Five Weeks in a Balloon]]. Jaspar Hobson is a lieutenant of the Hudson's Bay Company, introduced at Captain Craventy's fête among "some sixty soldiers or employés of the Hudson's Bay Company" (FC-001-011). Verne draws him plainly: "Jaspar Hobson was a man of forty years of age" (FC-001-024), "a child of the Company," born at Fort Assiniboin and "no mere hunter, but a soldier, a brave and intelligent officer."
